task: Build a daily ops digest: stamp UTC time, list the latest files in the data directory via filesystem MCP, run light analysis on them, and write a short summary.

agents.name: TimestamperAgent
agents.instructions: Call TimePlugin.GetCurrentTime once. Output the ISO-8601 timestamp on a single line.

agents.name: FileListerAgent
agents.description: Lists the latest files via filesystem MCP
agents.instructions: Use the filesystem MCP tools to list files in the data directory. Sort by modification time descending. Return up to 20 entries.

agents.name: AnalystAgent
agents.description: Performs light analysis on the file index
agents.instructions: Group entries by file extension and produce a small frequency table. Use CodeInterpreter for any tabular work.

agents.name: SummaryAgent
agents.instructions: Combine the timestamp, file list, and analysis into a 5-line daily digest in plain text.

settings._note: Hybrid example: plugin (TimePlugin), MCP tool (filesystem), hosted tool (CodeInterpreter), text-only agent. Set MCP_FS_ROOT env var before run.
